IT Support Engineer

Job description

Ability to explain technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical users. The successful candidate will be responsible for providing first-line technical support to our investment banking professionals, maintaining local office technology, provisioning user devices, assisting with user administration, and ensuring a seamless technology experience across the New York office.
